title: Senior Financial Analyst - Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited in Patna is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited:
Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited!
